accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA context (chapter 8 of title 5 = Congressional Review Act) is verifiably accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: The added Congressional Review Act reference is correct context, not a fabrication.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the BOEM marine archaeological resources rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Identifies the CRA mechanism and that the rule is rendered without force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: This simple disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the resolution was approved March 14, 2025, matching the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the entire operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no editorializing.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding, with only a minor restatement of nullification.

correct_entities.why: BOEM, the rule title, the Federal Register citation, and the CRA are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 71160), publication date, and approval date are all correct.
